items.title: Direct comparison of efficacy of combining ivermectin versus five first-line chemotherapy drugs with recombinant methioninase against colon-cancer cells
items.description: BACKGROUND/AIM: Ivermectin is emerging as a potential anticancer agent. In the present study, we compared the efficacy of the rMETase combination with ivermectin versus rMETase combined with each of five first-line chemotherapeutic agents, on HCT116 human colon-cancer cells.
